title_en: GAIA-1: A Generative World Model for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: GAIA-1：面向自动驾驶的生成式世界模型
abstract_en: Wayve presents a generative world model for driving scenes and future rollout.
abstract_zh: Wayve 提出面向驾驶场景和未来展开的生成式世界模型。
editorial_summary_zh: 自动驾驶里将世界模型概念产品化的重要里程碑。
editorial_summary_en: A major step in world-model narratives for driving.
why_it_matters: Shows how generative scene modeling can support autonomous-driving evaluation and forecasting.
